title: PixelPanel
description: A very customizable and helpful HUD mod!
body:
# PixelPanel

**Your screen, your way.**

PixelPanel is a lightweight, client-side HUD customization mod for Fabric that lets you add, move, resize, and style overlay elements anywhere on your screen.

## Features

- **Drag-and-drop editor** — Press **H** to open the HUD editor. Click to select, drag to move, scroll to scale, and grab corners to resize.
- **8 HUD elements** to choose from:
  - **Coordinates** — Live X/Y/Z position
  - **FPS Counter** — Color-coded (green/yellow/red) performance display
  - **Compass** — Dynamic direction strip with cardinal and intercardinal headings
  - **Time of Day** — In-game clock with sun/moon icons
  - **Tool Durability** — Held item icon with durability bar and numbers
  - **Armor Durability** — All 4 armor slots with individual durability bars
  - **Minimap** — Real-time top-down map with 32-block radius
  - **Debug Info** — Compact F3 replacement (FPS, position, chunk, biome, light levels)
- **Toggle backgrounds** — Switch between solid and transparent element backgrounds
- **Toggle visibility** — Hide elements without removing them
- **Resolution-independent** — Positions are stored as screen anchors, so your layout adapts to any window size
- **Auto-saving config** — Your layout persists in `config/pixelpanel.json`

## Details

| | |
|---|---|
| **Minecraft** | 1.21.11 |
| **Mod Loader** | Fabric |
| **Environment** | Client-side only |
| **Dependencies** | Fabric API |
| **License** | MIT |
